allies.rationale_text: Feedback-loops supports flow because immediate performance signals let the person adjust inside the activity without breaking immersion.
allies.source_quote: a defining feature of the flow state is the expectation of an immediate feedback loop

allies.rationale_text: Goal-setting supports flow by keeping attention tied to a clear objective instead of diffuse effort.
allies.source_quote: Flow requires clarity regarding the goal

antagonists.rationale_text: Cognitive-load-theory conflicts with flow when overload or too many unrelated inputs disrupt the synchronized concentration flow depends on.
antagonists.source_quote: overwhelming the working memory with too many unrelated pieces of information prevents the synchronized engagement required for flow

structured_tensions.tension_text: Flow conflicts with critical-thinking when the immersive automaticity of flow bypasses the deliberate analytical monitoring needed to catch reasoning errors.
structured_tensions.source_quote: flow conflicts with critical-thinking (critical thinking) when the immersive automaticity of flow bypasses the deliberate analytical monitoring needed to catch reasoning errors.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Flow conflicts with self-control when the absorptive state of flow overrides stopping rules that should interrupt the activity when conditions change.
structured_tensions.source_quote: flow conflicts with self-control (self control) when the absorptive state of flow overrides stopping rules that should interrupt the activity when conditions change.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
